description: Friendly, approachable, shows personality. Best for startups, NGOs, creative industries.

examples.title: Warm Application to BongoHive Startup Incubator
examples.body:
10 May 2026

Hello BongoHive Team,

I am thrilled to apply for the Software Development Internship at BongoHive. As a self-taught developer who started building websites at fifteen, I have always been drawn to environments where creativity and technical skill come together.

What excites me most about BongoHive is your mission to support Zambian entrepreneurs. During my second year at UNZA, I co-founded a small web development collective that built e-commerce sites for local market vendors in Lusaka. We helped five vendors establish online presence, and one of them saw a 40% increase in orders within three months. That experience taught me that technology is most powerful when it solves real problems for real people.

I am proficient in React, Node.js, and Firebase, and I am currently learning Flutter to expand into mobile development. I love the fast-paced, iterative nature of startup work and I thrive in environments where I can wear multiple hats and learn from experienced mentors.

I would love the opportunity to contribute to BongoHive's projects while growing as a developer. Thank you for considering my application.

Warm regards,

Patricia Ndhlovu

examples.title: Personal Letter for NGO Communications Internship
examples.body:
8 February 2026

Dear Ms. Banda,

I came across your Communications Internship posting on LinkedIn and immediately felt it was the perfect fit for my skills and values. As someone who grew up in a rural community in Eastern Province, I have seen firsthand how effective communication can transform communities.

At Mulungushi University, I studied Mass Communication and specialised in digital storytelling. For my final project, I created a documentary series highlighting the challenges faced by girls in accessing STEM education in rural Zambia. The series was featured on our university channel and reached over 10,000 viewers online.

I am particularly skilled in content creation, social media management, and community engagement. I have managed Instagram and Facebook accounts for two student organisations, growing their followership by over 300% collectively. I also have intermediate skills in video editing using Adobe Premiere Pro and Canva for graphic design.

Your organisation's work in community empowerment aligns perfectly with my passion. I am eager to bring my creativity, energy, and storytelling skills to your communications team.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best wishes,

Mercy Zulu

examples.title: Warm Application for Creative Agency
examples.body:
18 July 2026

Hi Design House Team,

I am applying for the Junior Graphic Designer position, and I wanted to share why I think I would be a great addition to your creative team.

Design has been my passion since I was a child sketching logos for imaginary businesses. Today, I bring that same enthusiasm to every project I work on. I recently completed my diploma in Graphic Design at Evelyn Hone College, where I developed skills in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, and brand identity design.

During my attachment at a local print shop, I redesigned the visual identity for three small businesses, including a restaurant and a boutique. One client reported that their new branding helped them secure a partnership with a larger retailer. That kind of impact is what drives me as a designer.

I am excited about the opportunity to learn from your experienced team while contributing fresh ideas and energy. I am also comfortable working under tight deadlines, as my college training emphasised real-world client projects.

I have attached my portfolio for your review. Thank you for considering me!

Kind regards,

Temwani Banda
